'''Gal Brello''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Trans-Nebular sector/Legends|Trans-Nebular sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Brello worked from a base on [[Milarian]], the sector capital, and had replaced the former Moff, [[Nebin Cray]].

{{Char-stub}}
